seoTitle: Tiona vs Tiri — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tiona and Tiri. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tiona and Tiri.
heading: Tiona vs Tiri — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tiona, New South Wales and Tiri, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tiona has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Tiri (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tiona or Tiri safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tiona has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Tiri scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tiona scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Tiri scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tiona or Tiri?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tiona has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
